description_long: This kiosk is a compact, free-standing retail display unit designed to showcase paint products, specifically Sniezka Kids paint and other related items. The structure consists of three horizontal shelves supported by a black metal or plastic frame, with the shelves filled with paint cans and containers. The front and side panels are adorned with bold red promotional signage in Cyrillic script, advertising discounts and special offers. The top of the kiosk features a large printed header with a paint roller graphic and additional promotional text. The overall design is highly functional, maximizing product visibility and accessibility while drawing attention with vibrant colors and clear branding. The kiosk is open on the front and sides, allowing easy access to the products for customers.
description: A compact retail kiosk with three shelves displaying paint products, featuring bold red promotional signage and a large branded header. The structure is open and accessible, designed for high product visibility and customer interaction.
description_view_0: Front view showing three shelves filled with Sniezka Kids paint containers and red promotional signage at the base and header.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves, the arrangement of paint cans, and a large vertical red promotional panel.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with shelves of paint products and prominent signage, but with a different arrangement of paint cans.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the vertical promotional panel and the side profile of the kiosk.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs and banners; large printed header above top shelf, red printed panels on front and sides with Cyrillic promotional text and paint roller graphic.
attribute_roof_design: Flat header panel, no overhang or awning, constructed from printed board or plastic.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial display with utilitarian and promotional design elements.
